raw_text: {"intent":"Extract atomic memory cards from a small preference table.","decision":"commit_success","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam prefers Bill Evans.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Bill Evans","type":"person","role":"preferred item"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"prefers","object":"Bill Evans"}]},{"kind":"preference","statement":"Daniele prefers knowledge graphs.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Daniele","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"knowledge graphs","type":"concept","role":"preferred item"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Daniele","predicate":"prefers","object":"knowledge graphs"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No ambiguous entity references requiring resolution."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"Committed 2 atomic preference cards.","citations":["Input table: Sam | Bill Evans","Input table: Daniele | Knowledge graphs"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Extracted 2 explicit preference facts from the table.","No ambiguity or superseding information detected."]}}
